# TTCalc

> Free TikTok Shop seller tools — fee calculator, profit calculator, and platform comparison. Independent, no signup, no tracking.

## Tools

- [TikTok Shop Fee Calculator](https://ttcalc.shop/tools/tiktok-fee-calculator/): Calculate the full TikTok Shop fee stack including 6% referral, $0.30 transaction fee, FBT fulfillment, creator commissions, and refund administration.
- [TikTok Shop Profit Calculator](https://ttcalc.shop/tools/tiktok-profit-calculator/): Model net profit per unit after TikTok fees, COGS, shipping, ad spend, creator commissions, and returns.
- [TikTok vs Amazon FBA](https://ttcalc.shop/tools/tiktok-vs-amazon/): Side-by-side comparison of TikTok Shop and Amazon FBA fees and profit at the same price point.

## Guides

- [TikTok Shop Fees in 2026: A Complete Breakdown](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-fees-2026/): Every fee TikTok charges sellers in 2026 — referral, transaction, FBT fulfillment, creator commissions, refund administration.
- [TikTok Shop Profit Killers: 5 Hidden Mistakes](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-profit-killers-2026/): Five mistakes that silently destroy TikTok Shop margins.
- [GMV Max on TikTok Shop 2026](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-gmv-max-2026/): Budget rules (10x AOV), ROAS benchmarks (2.5x), scaling strategy for TikTok's automated ad system.
- [TikTok Shop Affiliate Program 2026](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-affiliate-program-2026/): Open vs Target plans, commission rates (13.02% US average), clawback mechanics.
- [TikTok Shop Return Rates Guide](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-return-rates-cost-2026/): Return rates by category and the true cost of returns including refund admin fees.
- [TikTok Shop Taxes 2026](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-taxes-2026/): 1091-K threshold ($20,000+200tx), marketplace facilitator sales tax, deductible fees.
- [FBT Fulfillment Costs 2026](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-fbt-fulfillment-guide-2026/): Fulfilled by TikTok fee tiers, storage, and comparison vs self-fulfillment and Amazon FBA.
- [TikTok Shop vs Amazon FBA 2026](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-vs-amazon-fba-2026/): Complete fee and profit comparison with real $30 product examples.
- [How to Calculate TikTok Shop Profit Per Unit](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-profit-per-unit-2026/): Step-by-step formula for real profit per unit at multiple price points.
- [TikTok Shop SEO Guide](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-seo-guide-2026/): Product listing optimization for TikTok Shop search in 2026.
- [TikTok Shop Live Shopping Strategy 2026](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-live-shopping-strategy-2026/): How to plan broadcasts, structure deals, choose products, and convert viewers into buyers.
- [TikTok Shop Account Health Rating 2026](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-account-health-rating-2026/): How the Account Health Rating works, what triggers violations, and how to maintain good standing.
- [Profit Calculator Guide](https://ttcalc.shop/blog/tiktok-shop-profit-calculator-guide/): How to use the TTCalc Profit Calculator to model real TikTok Shop profitability.

## About

- [About TTCalc](https://ttcalc.shop/about/): Independent project built by TikTok Shop sellers, for sellers. Not affiliated with TikTok or ByteDance.
